natural_language: Generate a vertical mobile game shop bundle screen for a pastoral match-3 game. It should have a spring garden mood, a centered shop panel, three product cards, a currency counter, a close button, a red hot-deal ribbon, and one primary buy button. The result must be suitable for later standalone sprite generation and layout reconstruction.
theme: pastoral spring shop with garden leaves, soft sunlight, fruit and flower accents
visual_style: polished 2D game UI, rounded forms, clean readable silhouettes, soft bevels, warm gold trim, consistent painterly highlights
material: painted enamel, soft fabric panel centers, polished gold trim, subtle candy-like highlights
